title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Pidilite Industries

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Pidilite Industries
jsonLd.description:
We at Pidilite Industries are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pidilite Industries:
Pidilite Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pidilite Industries!
